PRT-002Proteins & Meat

Beef USDA — Halal

USDA Choice / Select

USDA-certified Halal beef for international import and export. Choice / Select grades from US facilities. FOB / CFR / CIF. IFANCA / ISWA Halal certification. Negotiated pricing.

Min. Volume
10,000 KG

USDA Wholesale Reports

Request for Quotation

Beef USDA — Halal

USDA Choice / Select · Min 10,000 KG

Not ready to submit? Speak with our team first.

AML/KYC pre-screened · TLS encrypted · FATF compliant

Technical Specification

GradeUSDA Choice / Select
CertificationUSDA / Halal (IFANCA/ISWA)
SlaughterHand / Machine (certified)
Cut TypesForequarter / Hindquarter / Primal
PackagingVacuum-sealed / Cryovac
TemperatureChilled 0–4°C / Frozen -18°C
Shelf LifeChilled: 45 days / Frozen: 18 months
OriginUSA (Midwest / South)
Min. Volume10,000 KG / FCL
InspectionUSDA FSIS / Accredited Halal body

Certifications & Compliance

USDA FSISHalal CertifiedFATF AMLHealth Certified
Responsible Desk
HOU / SGP Hub
proteins@xrtgroup.com
Response SLA: <4 Business Hours

XRT Group manages halal protein procurement for institutional buyers across 6 continents. We source USDA-certified Halal beef directly from Midwest and South US processing facilities.

Quality & Certification

USDA Choice / Select grade, accompanied by full USDA FSIS health certificates and Halal certification from accredited bodies such as IFANCA or ISWA. Hand-slaughtered or machine-slaughtered (certified) options available.

Logistics & Delivery

Available as forequarter, hindquarter, or primal cuts. Packaging in vacuum-sealed cryovac. Transported chilled (0–4°C) with a 45-day shelf life, or frozen (-18°C) with an 18-month shelf life. Full documentation including Halal cert, Health cert, COO, and USDA stamp.
